title: Denise's Corn Casserole
description: The classic five-ingredient corn pudding casserole built on Jiffy mix, whole and creamed corn, sour cream, and butter — mix, pour, and bake.
instructions: In a bowl, mix all of the ingredients together and pour into a greased 8"x8" baking pan.
Bake uncovered for 45–50 minutes, or until lightly browned.
